Fool: A cluster of transparent maggots, a mass of Spirit Body Threads.[32] The maggots are three-dimensional, intricate, and translucent, layered with strange, layered patterns that looked like doors of light, each containing different patterns and symbolic meanings. This worm is called the Worm of Spirit.[33]
Door: A cluster of standard spherical lights, or rather, a cluster of countless glowing bubbles. Each bubble is surrounded by a few transparent distorted worms (Worms of Cosmos). Inside the bubble, multiple doors of light can be vaguely seen layered on top of each other. Each layer has an eye that seems to be hiding in the dark, and each eye contains different patterns.[33]
Error: An avatar of Amon was shown to be a cluster of stereoscopic, translucent, clock-like patterns (Worms of Time) layered on top of each other.[34] Its body is composed of independent yet interconnected segments that are like clocks. On each segment, distinct ticks can be seen, but they correspond to different scales. On top of that, there's a ring of faint doors of light that are tightly connected to one another.[33]
White Tower: The White Tower pathway's Mythical Creature form consists of pure, blinding light, with countless complex symbols and text swirling within. It represents a living manifestation of absolute truth and infinite knowledge.
Visionary: The Visionary pathway's Mythical Creature form is a colossal, transcendent golden dragon with translucent, crystal-like scales. Within its eyes, entire illusory worlds and civilizations appear to be born, flourish, and fade away into nothingness.
Sun: A formless, blazing, giant fireball that contains single-cell organisms resembling complex abstract symbols. At Sequence 0, the Eternal Blazing Sun manifests as a glowing white sun that fills the sky, raining golden liquid that incinerates everything.
Tyrant_Pathway: A giant, towering silhouette covered in violent lightning, hurricane currents, and terrifying storm winds. Beneath the winds lie rows of deep-blue, smooth scales mixed with strange symbols, and numerous slimy, writhing tentacles.
Hanged Man: A massive shadow wrapped in grotesque, shadowy chains, adorned with a massive upside-down cross on its back. Countless crying faces of trapped spirits, abstract blood stains, and dark, corruption-oozing symbols constantly swirl on its surface.
Darkness: A huge, terrifying monster resembling a mix of a massive black hound and a giant spider, covered entirely in absolute pitch-black fur and countless layered, obsidian-like eyes. It radiates a pure aura of eternal silence, rest, and sweet dreams.
Death: A massive, floating feathered serpent entirely constructed out of pure white bones and dark green underworld gas. Its sockets burn with pale blue soul fires, and its gaze can strip the vitality and lifeforce out of any living creature instantly.
Twilight Giant: A colossal, armored giant radiating the dim, orange-red glow of an impending sunset. Its body is covered in ancient iron armor fused with decaying symbolic runes, giving off an overwhelming concept of physical decay, ruin, and finality.
Red Priest: A towering being of absolute, raging crimson flames that take the shape of an armored warlord. The surrounding space distorts due to extreme heat, and within the core of the fire, complex military formations and war banners continuously flicker.
Demoness: A mesmerizing yet deeply terrifying female figure made entirely of dense, chaotic gray fog and dense spider threads. Underneath the illusion of beauty lies a horrific, writhing mass of purplish-black plague spots and disease-carrying symbols.
Paragon: A giant, abstract structure composed entirely of interlocking bronze gears, steam pistons, and glowing circuit-like pathways. It continuously processes a stream of complex industrial blue blueprints and geometric calculation models.
Hermit: A massive humanoid figure wearing a tattered gray robe, with its entire body beneath the robe composed of infinite streams of purple information streams, ancient mystical symbols, and rows of blinking eyes reflecting forbidden knowledge.
Wheel of Fortune: A gigantic, abstract, multi-layered stone or crystal wheel that continuously rotates in multiple directions simultaneously. The wheel is engraved with mysterious divination cards, astrological symbols, and fluctuating golden threads of fate.
Chained Man: A massive, distorted humanoid figure wrapped tightly from head to toe in heavy, rust-colored iron chains and black bandages. Its form constantly tries to burst outward into a grotesque mass of animalistic fur, fangs, and blood-shot eyes.
Abomination: A horrifying, ever-changing mass of pitch-black flesh, covered in giant slavering mouths, mismatching limbs, and thick, slimy tentacles. It radiates a pervasive aura of raw, maddening desire, unbridled mutation, and savage biological corruption.
Justiciar: A giant, abstract balance scale composed of pure golden light, with an unbending, armored judge silhouette standing behind it. It emits an inescapable field of absolute order, where abstract legal rules and physical restrictions materialize.
Black Emperor: A towering figure clad in an enormous, shadow-infused imperial robe and a spiked crown. It radiates a dark, tyrannical authority, and its very presence warps physical and mystical rules, establishing self-contradicting, distorted laws.
